utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: So you still in touch with anyone from high school ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Umm . Well , there is Rachel , and umm , I think that is it . How bout you ?

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Oh yeah , I still hang with Simmons and Zana , you know .

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Devane , Kelly , and I run into Goldie from time to time .

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Stick , Brown , Sulkov , McGuire , J . T . , Beardsley .

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Ehh , you know after high school , you just kinda lose touch . Oh yeah ! I ran into Richard Dorfman .

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Not so good , Simmons and I gave him a wedgie .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Is not he an architect now ?
